V0200A13A Feeding Tube Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Feeding Tube CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
589 V0200A13B_FEEDG_TUBE_CPL_CD V0200A13B_FEEDG_TUBE_CPL_CD V0200A13B Feeding Tube Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Feeding Tube care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
590
